method_order.attempt_when: playwright package and managed browser bundle are already present; install only if same-turn network probe succeeds
method_order.known_current_status: package present; browser bundle absent; install DNS failed in prior probe
success_artifacts: metadata with viewport and nonblank image check

method_order.attempt_when: chromium binary present and no same-turn hard-fail cache says it is hanging
method_order.known_current_status: chromium present but hung in prior probe

method_order.attempt_when: xvfb-run and chromium present and direct chromium failed without hard sandbox crash
method_order.known_current_status: xvfb-run present; hung in prior probe

success_artifacts: png screenshots via browser-specific command or automation

method_order.attempt_when: weasyprint is present and artifact class permits proxy evidence
always, and as fallback when rendering is blocked

pc_addendum_policy: Always prepare but do not require PC/PowerShell/CI replay unless artifact_type or production flag declares browser_screenshot_required.

promotion_rules.browser_screenshot_preferred: ALLOW_RENDER_PROXY_WITH_LIMITATION if true browser replay fails after bounded attempts and proxy/static evidence passes.
promotion_rules.browser_screenshot_required: DENY if no true browser screenshot is produced inside the current environment; emit PC/CI addendum but do not pretend proxy evidence is browser proof.
promotion_rules.render_proxy_allowed: ALLOW_RENDER_PROXY_WITH_LIMITATION when WeasyPrint/static evidence passes and limitation is recorded.
promotion_rules.static_only_allowed: ALLOW_STATIC_ONLY_WITH_LIMITATION only for low-risk visual documentation or pre-implementation review packets.

purpose: Make visual render verification sandbox-first for Android/ChatGPT workflows while preserving stronger PC/CI browser replay as an enhancement lane.
reliability_learning_policy: Every attempt must append method reliability evidence. Repeated hard-fail methods should be skipped within the same stage unless input conditions changed.
